articles.title: catchorg/Catch2
articles.excerpt: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)
articles.summary: Catch2 是一个现代 C++ 原生测试框架，支持单元测试、TDD 和 BDD，兼容 C++14/17 及更高版本（旧版支持 C++11 和 C++03）。它提供简单的宏和自动化测试发现，适合 C++ 开发者编写快速、可读的测试用例，广泛应用于各类 C++ 项目。

articles.title: abseil/abseil-cpp
articles.excerpt: Abseil Common Libraries (C++)
articles.summary: Abseil 是 Google 开源的 C++ 公共库集合，提供基础组件如字符串处理、容器、算法和同步原语等。它弥补了 C++ 标准库的不足，并确保跨平台一致性，被大量 C++ 项目采用以提升开发效率。

articles.title: davila7/claude-code-templates
articles.excerpt: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
articles.summary: claude-code-templates 是一个 CLI 工具，用于配置和监控 Claude Code（AI 编程助手）。它帮助开发者管理模板、运行任务并监控 Claude Code 的执行状态，适合需要自动化代码生成和 AI 辅助编程的场景。

articles.title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
articles.excerpt: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
articles.summary: stitch-skills 是一个 Agent 技能库，设计用于 Stitch MCP 服务器。每个技能遵循 Agent Skills 开放标准，兼容 Antigravity、Gemini CLI、Claude Code 等编码代理。它为 AI 代理提供可插拔的能力，扩展其执行复杂任务（如文件操作、代码分析）的能力。

articles.title: hashicorp/terraform
articles.excerpt: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
articles.summary: Terraform 是开源的基础设施即代码工具，使用声明式配置文件管理云和本地资源。它支持多云提供商，通过计划与执行流程实现安全、可预测的基础设施变更，被 DevOps 团队广泛用于自动化资源部署与版本控制。

articles.title: zeux/meshoptimizer
articles.excerpt: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render
articles.summary: meshoptimizer 是一个 3D 网格优化库，通过顶点重排、几何压缩和 LOD 简化等技术，在不影响视觉质量的前提下缩小网格体积并提升渲染性能。它适用于游戏引擎、实时渲染和 3D 模型处理管道。

articles.title: openai/plugins
articles.excerpt: OpenAI Plugins
articles.summary: OpenAI Plugins 是连接 ChatGPT 等 AI 模型与外部 API 的钩子系统，允许模型执行实时操作（如查询数据库、调用第三方服务）。它扩展了 AI 的交互能力，典型用途包括自动化工作流和信息检索。

articles.title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
articles.excerpt: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
articles.summary: DesktopCommanderMCP 是一个 MCP 服务器，为 Claude（AI 助手）提供终端控制、文件系统搜索和 diff 文件编辑能力。它让 AI 能直接操作本地开发环境，适合需要 AI 辅助编程或自动化脚本执行的场景。

articles.title: chriskohlhoff/asio
articles.excerpt: Asio C++ Library
articles.summary: Asio 是一个跨平台的 C++ 网络和低级 I/O 库，提供异步 I/O 模型（如 TCP/UDP、串口、定时器）。它基于 Proactor 设计模式，支持多线程和高性能网络服务，被广泛应用于服务器、游戏引擎和嵌入式系统。

articles.title: oven-sh/bun
articles.excerpt: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
articles.summary: Bun 是一个极快的 JavaScript 运行时，同时集成了包管理器、打包器和测试运行器。它基于 WebKit 引擎，原生支持 TypeScript 和 Node.js 模块，启动和运行速度远超 Node/Deno，适合现代前端开发、全栈应用和微服务。

articles.title: actions/checkout
articles.excerpt: Action for checking out a repo
articles.summary: actions/checkout 是 GitHub 官方的 Action，用于在 GitHub Actions 工作流中自动检出仓库代码。它是几乎所有工作流的第一步，支持子模块、稀疏检出和标签检出，是 CI/CD 管道的基础组件。

articles.title: home-assistant/core
articles.excerpt: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
articles.summary: Home Assistant 是一个开源的家庭自动化平台，注重本地控制与隐私。它支持数千种设备（灯具、传感器、开关等）的集成，提供自动化规则、面板和语音控制，用户可通过插件扩展功能，用于智能家居的集中管理。

articles.title: microsoft/PowerToys
articles.excerpt: Microsoft PowerToys is a collection of utilities that supercharge productivity and customization on Windows
articles.summary: PowerToys 是微软推出的 Windows 实用工具集，包含 FancyZones（窗口布局）、PowerRename（批量重命名）、Color Picker（颜色提取）等模块。它面向 Windows 用户，通过系统级增强提升操作效率与自定义能力。

articles.title: cypress-io/cypress
articles.excerpt: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.
articles.summary: Cypress 是一个面向浏览器的下一代前端测试工具，提供快速、可靠、实时的端到端测试和组件测试。它内置截图/录屏、自动等待、时间旅行调试等特性，支持现代前端框架，适合开发者和 QA 进行自动化测试。

articles.title: vercel/next.js
articles.excerpt: The React Framework
articles.summary: Next.js 是 React 的全栈框架，支持静态生成、服务端渲染、增量静态再生成等模式。它提供文件路由、API 路由、中间件等特性，适合构建高性能的 Web 应用和网站，被广泛应用于企业级项目和个人站点。

articles.title: DayuanJiang/next-ai-draw-io
articles.excerpt: A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.
articles.summary: next-ai-draw-io 是一个基于 Next.js 的 Web 应用，整合了 AI 能力与 draw.io 图表编辑器。用户可通过自然语言命令创建、修改和增强图表，AI 自动生成架构图、流程图等，适合开发者快速可视化系统设计。

articles.title: malisper/pgrust
articles.excerpt: Postgres rewritten in Rust, now passing 100% of the Postgres regression tests
articles.summary: pgrust 是用 Rust 重写 PostgreSQL 的探索性项目，目前已通过 100% 的官方回归测试。它保留 Postgres 的 SQL 兼容性和行为，同时利用 Rust 的内存安全与性能优势，为数据库开发者提供了一个更安全的实现参考。

articles.title: dotnet/aspnetcore
articles.excerpt: ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.
articles.summary: ASP.NET Core 是微软开源的跨平台 .NET Web 框架，用于构建现代云应用（REST API、MVC、Blazor 等）。它支持 Windows/macOS/Linux，提供高性能、轻量级和模块化特性，适合 .NET 开发者构建企业级 Web 服务。

articles.title: prisma/prisma
articles.excerpt: Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB
articles.summary: Prisma 是 Node.js/TypeScript 的下一代 ORM，支持 PostgreSQL、MySQL、SQLite、MongoDB 等多种数据库。它提供类型安全的查询 API、自动迁移和数据建模工具，显著提升后端开发效率，适合现代应用的数据层。

articles.title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
articles.excerpt: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.
articles.summary: claude-cookbooks 是 Anthropic 提供的 Claude 用法示例集合，包含 Jupyter Notebook 和食谱。它展示如何通过提示工程、函数调用和多步推理来构建实用 AI 应用，适合希望深入利用 Claude 能力的开发者和研究者。

articles.title: obra/superpowers
articles.excerpt: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
articles.summary: Superpowers 是一个 Agent 技能框架和软件开发方法论，提供结构化方式构建和组合 AI 代理能力。它强调实用性和可重复性，帮助开发者高效构建复杂工作流，适合 AI 应用开发和自动化场景。

articles.title: nasa/fprime
articles.excerpt: F´ - A flight software and embedded systems framework
articles.summary: F´ (F Prime) 是 NASA 开发的飞行软件和嵌入式系统框架，用于航天器、无人机和其他实时系统。它提供组件架构、自动代码生成和地面数据系统支持，通过 C++ 实现高性能与可靠性，被航空航天领域采用。

articles.title: ansible/ansible
articles.excerpt: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on rem
articles.summary: Ansible 是一个极简的 IT 自动化平台，用于应用部署、配置管理、多云编排等。它基于 YAML 无代理工作流，无需在目标节点安装额外软件，通过 SSH 执行任务，被运维团队用于批量自动化操作。

articles.title: nuxt/nuxt
articles.excerpt: the full-stack Vue framework
articles.summary: Nuxt 是一个基于 Vue 的全栈框架，提供静态生成、服务端渲染、文件路由、模块生态等功能。它抽象了 Vue 应用的配置流程，支持 TypeScript 和自动化导入，适合构建 SEO 友好的网站和复杂的 Vue 应用。

articles.summary: 提出Memory-Guided Agent框架，将冻结的Vision-Language-Action（VLA）模型与记忆引导机制结合，增强语义重定向、目标重绑定等部署扰动下的操作鲁棒性，提升机器人语言条件操作在真实环境中的稳定性。

articles.title: DrugGen 2: A disease-aware language model for enhancing drug discovery
articles.excerpt: Current computational approaches for drug design typically focus on generating molecules conditioned on specific targets or general molecular properties, often neglecting the influence of disease context on target behavior and therapeutic outcomes. To address this gap, we introduce DrugGen-2, a novel generative model that designs small molecules conditioned on both disease ontology and target prot
articles.summary: 提出DrugGen-2生成模型，同时基于疾病本体和靶点蛋白序列设计小分子，弥补现有方法忽视疾病上下文的不足，推动疾病特异性的药物发现。

articles.title: TTHE: Test-Time Harness Evolution
articles.excerpt: The behavior of an LLM agent is determined not only by the underlying model, but also by its harness: the executable program that constructs context, invokes tools, verifies intermediate results, and recovers from failures. Existing approaches optimize such harnesses before deployment, searching training or development data for a fixed agent workflow that is then frozen at test time. This limits a
articles.summary: 提出TTHE方法，在测试时动态优化LLM agent的执行框架（工具调用、结果验证与故障恢复），替代固定预部署流程，提升agent面对未知场景的适应能力。

articles.title: CausalDS: Benchmarking Causal Reasoning in Data-Science Agents
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly act as integrated data-science agents, combining abstract reasoning with advanced tool use. Yet the relevant benchmark landscape largely divides into symbolic causal reasoning benchmarks without realistic data analysis or data analysis benchmarks without a principled causal data-generating structure. Furthermore, existing causal evaluation datasets are oft
articles.summary: 构建CausalDS基准，将真实数据分析任务与因果数据生成结构结合，系统评估LLM数据科学代理的因果推理能力，填补现有基准在符号推理与现实分析间的空白。

articles.title: Tool-Making and Self-Evolving LLM Agents in Low-Latency Systems
articles.excerpt: Production LLM agents often waste latency and reliability by regenerating code for the same procedural steps on every request. We replace this inference-time coding loop with an agentic tool-making pipeline that compiles repeated SOP steps into validated, versioned tools before deployment. The tool-maker grounds synthesis in the live environment as it collects execution traces, observes backend sc
articles.summary: 提出工具制造管线，将重复SOP步骤预先编译为版本化已验证工具，避免推理时重复生成代码；结合执行迹自演化，降低延迟并提升低延迟系统中LLM agent的可靠性。

articles.title: DeepSWE: Measuring Frontier Coding Agents on Original, Long-Horizon Engineering Tasks
articles.excerpt: DeepSWE is a benchmark of 113 original, long-horizon software engineering tasks for evaluating coding agents. Most public agentic coding benchmarks follow SWE-bench in mining merged fixes from public GitHub repositories, which creates two problems: the fixes and their discussion were likely seen during pretraining, so a high score can reflect recall rather than problem-solving; and each task is gr
articles.summary: 发布DeepSWE基准，包含113个原创、长周期软件工程任务，避免预训练数据泄露问题，更真实地评估前沿编码agent在复杂问题解决中的能力。

articles.title: Infinity-Parser2 Technical Report
articles.excerpt: We present Infinity-Parser2, a large multimodal model that couples a controllable data-synthesis pipeline with multi-task reinforcement learning for end-to-end document parsing, addressing the persistent scarcity of faithfully annotated parsing corpora. Our contributions are threefold. First, we build a scalable synthesis engine, pairing a controllable rendering framework with an iterative refinem
articles.summary: 提出Infinity-Parser2多模态大模型，耦合可控数据合成流水线与多任务强化学习，实现端到端文档解析，有效解决注释语料匮乏问题。

articles.title: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment
articles.excerpt: Training tool-use agents to improve from their own experience remains challenging, as supervised fine-tuning relies on fixed teacher-distilled trajectories, while sparse-reward reinforcement learning provides weak supervision for long-horizon interactions. We present DeepSearch-Evolve, a self-distillation framework for web agents built on DeepSearch-World, a deterministic and verifiable environmen
articles.summary: 提出DeepSearch-Evolve自蒸馏框架，在确定性可验证环境DeepSearch-World中训练web agent，利用自生成轨迹迭代提升，克服稀疏奖励与监督微调局限。

articles.title: PERFOPT-Bench: Evaluating Coding Agents on Software Performance Optimization
articles.excerpt: Coding-agent benchmarks have largely measured whether agents can produce functionally correct patches, but production software also demands measurable speedups on real execution targets. Performance optimization is a distinct agentic task: agents must profile executions, diagnose cross-layer bottlenecks, edit code without breaking correctness, and verify that gains are reproducible rather than mea
articles.summary: 构建PERFOPT-Bench基准，要求编码agent进行性能剖析、跨层瓶颈诊断、代码优化并验证加速，衡量功能性之外的实际性能提升能力。

articles.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE
articles.excerpt: Modern LLMs are increasingly deployed in long-context applications such as retrieval-augmented generation, repository-level coding, and agentic workflows whose accumulated reasoning and tool traces routinely push the input an order of magnitude past the pretraining window, making zero-shot context extension the dominant deployment path for open-weight checkpoints. Most existing zero-shot methods f
articles.summary: 提出Jet-Long方法，采用动态双焦RoPE实现高效零样本长上下文扩展，无需额外训练即可将预训练模型窗口扩展一个量级，适用于RAG和agent工作流。
